    Edge
    Abstract ModelObject class for representing edges between anchors.
    Node
    This is the semantic object for nodes.

    Class and Description
    Graph
    This is the semantic object for graph models.
    ModelObject
    This is the semantic object that composes a graph model.
    ModelObjectEvent
    Event in the model.
    ModelObjectListener

    AbstractPropertyTooler
    Provides standard tools to manage properties.

    This is the connection point that permit to connect Edges and Nodes.
    AnchorLocation
    This enumeration defines the slots available for the anchors.

    Event in the model.

    Provides standard property names.
    View
    This is a view for a model object.
